---
title: 'Love Test'
date: '2011-10-07T18:56:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2648066710947240415'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/love-test.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Random'
  - 'study'
---

The Lost Test: <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/1-corinthians/passage.aspx?q=1-corinthians+13:4-8">1 Corinthians 13:4-8</a><br /><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/1-corinthians/passage.aspx?q=1-corinthians+13:4-8">NKJV</a></b><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"><span class="versetext" id="1co13-4" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">4</span>&nbsp;Love suffers long and is kind; love does not envy; love does not parade itself, is not puffed up;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-5" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">5</span>&nbsp;does not behave rudely, does not seek its own, is not provoked, thinks no evil;&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-6" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">6</span>&nbsp;does not rejoice in iniquity, but rejoices in the truth;&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-7" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">7</span>&nbsp;bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things.&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-8" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">8</span>&nbsp;Love never fails. But whether there are prophecies, they will fail; whether there are tongues, they will cease; whether there is knowledge, it will vanish away.</span></span><br /><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/msg/1-corinthians/passage.aspx?q=1-corinthians+13:4-8">Message</a></b><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"><span class="versetext" id="1co13-4" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">4</span>&nbsp;Love never gives up. Love cares more for others than for self. Love doesn't want what it doesn't have. Love doesn't strut, Doesn't have a swelled head,&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-5" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">5</span>&nbsp;Doesn't force itself on others, Isn't always "me first," Doesn't fly off the handle, Doesn't keep score of the sins of others,&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-6" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">6</span>&nbsp;Doesn't revel when others grovel, Takes pleasure in the flowering of truth,&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-7" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">7</span>&nbsp;Puts up with anything, Trusts God always, Always looks for the best, Never looks back, But keeps going to the end.&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-8" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">8</span>&nbsp;Love never dies. Inspired speech will be over some day; praying in tongues will end; understanding will reach its limit.</span></span><br /><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/bbe/1-corinthians/passage.aspx?q=1-corinthians+13:4-8">Bible in Basic English</a></b><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"><span class="versetext" id="1co13-4" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">4</span>&nbsp;Love is never tired of waiting; love is kind; love has no envy; love has no high opinion of itself, love has no pride;&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-5" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">5</span>&nbsp;Love's ways are ever fair, it takes no thought for itself; it is not quickly made angry, it takes no account of evil;&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-6" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">6</span>&nbsp;It takes no pleasure in wrongdoing, but has joy in what is true;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-7" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">7</span>&nbsp;Love has the power of undergoing all things, having faith in all things, hoping all things.&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="1co13-8" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">8</span>Though the prophet's word may come to an end, tongues come to nothing, and knowledge have no more value, love has no end.</span></span><br /><b><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=1%20corinthians%2013:4-8&amp;version=AMP">Amplified Bible</a></b><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: 'Charis SIL', charis, Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 16px;"></span><br /><sup class="versenum" id="en-AMP-28668" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;">4</sup>Love endures long and is patient and kind; love never is envious nor boils over with jealousy, is not boastful or vainglorious, does not display itself haughtily.<br />&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<sup class="versenum" id="en-AMP-28669" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;">5</sup>It is not conceited (arrogant and inflated with pride); it is not rude (unmannerly) and does not act unbecomingly. Love (God's love in us) does not insist on its own rights or its own way, for it is not self-seeking; it is not touchy or fretful or resentful; it takes no account of the evil done to it [it pays no attention to a suffered wrong].<br />&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<sup class="versenum" id="en-AMP-28670" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;">6</sup>It does not rejoice at injustice and unrighteousness, but rejoices when right and truth prevail.<br />&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<sup class="versenum" id="en-AMP-28671" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;">7</sup>Love bears up under anything and everything that comes, is ever ready to believe the best of every person, its hopes are fadeless under all circumstances, and it endures everything [without weakening].<br />&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<sup class="versenum" id="en-AMP-28672" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;">8</sup>Love never fails [never fades out or becomes obsolete or comes to an end]. As for prophecy (<sup class="footnote" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: 0.5em; vertical-align: text-top;" value="[&lt;a href=&quot;#fen-AMP-28672a&quot; title=&quot;See footnote a&quot;&gt;a&lt;/a&gt;]">[<a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=1%20corinthians%2013:4-8&amp;version=AMP#fen-AMP-28672a" style="color: #651300; text-decoration: none;" title="See footnote a">a</a>]</sup>the gift of interpreting the divine will and purpose), it will be fulfilled and pass away; as for tongues, they will be destroyed and cease; as for knowledge, it will pass away [it will lose its value and be superseded by truth].<br /><br /><b><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: large;">Love:</span></b><br /><b>Checklist. Meditate the following attributes to see if you are walking out&nbsp;divine&nbsp;love:</b><br /><b><br /></b><br /><b>Endures Long</b><br /><b>Patient</b><br /><b>Kind</b><br /><b>No Envy/Jealousy</b><br /><b>Not Boastful</b><br /><b>Does not display itself Haughtily/Doesn't Parade Itself</b><br /><b>Not Arrogant/Proud</b><br /><b>Not Rude</b><br /><b>Not act unbecomingly</b><br /><b>Does not insist on it's own rights</b><br /><b>Is not Self-Seeking</b><br /><b>Is not touchy, fretful, or resentful</b><br /><b>Takes no account of wrongs</b><br /><b>Does not rejoice at injustice or unrighteousness but rejoices when right and truth prevail.</b><br /><b>Love bears up under anything and everything that comes</b><br /><b>Is ever ready to believe the BEST of every person</b><br /><b>Hopes without fading</b><br /><b>Endures everything without weakening</b><br /><br /><b>Love Never Fails</b><br /><br />Meditate this....<br /><br /><b>Darrell G. Wolfe</b><br /><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/goog_1951694273">Instructions given to Billye Brim by Kenneth Hagin talked about on the KCM BVOV Broadcast.</a><br /><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/goog_1951694273">Have Fervent Love Toward Each Other</a><br /><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/goog_1951694273">Gloria Copeland and Billye Brim</a><br /><a href="http://www.kcm.org/bvov-media">10/03-10/08 2011</a><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;"></span>
